title: Lappula brachycentra
taxonomy: Lappula brachycentra is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Lappula, which contains approximately 40 species of plants. The family Boraginaceae is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as borage or forget-me-nots. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and phylogenetic relationships. As a result, Lappula brachycentra is closely related to other members of the Boraginaceae family.
